message:
fix: endian-safe digests, integer overflow/underflow guards, NULL safety, and expanded test coverage

Deep audit round 3 (bd-37a) plus targeted fixes across the runtime:

Endian-portable digest computation (bd-jlc, bd-3h6):
- trace.c: add fnv1a_mix_u32/u64 helpers that serialize to LE bytes before
  hashing, replacing raw fnv1a_mix(&field, sizeof) which hashed native-endian
  memory and would produce different digests on big-endian platforms. Applied
  to asx_trace_digest(), asx_replay_verify(), and asx_trace_import_binary().
- telemetry.c: same pattern — telem_fnv1a_mix_u32/u64 for rolling digest.
- hindsight.c: same pattern — hs_fnv1a_mix_u32/u64 for hindsight digest.

Integer overflow/underflow saturation (bd-2u3, bd-2u5):
- scheduler.c: g_event_count saturates at UINT32_MAX; 4 task_count-- sites
  guarded with >0 check to prevent underflow.
- parallel.c: 4 matching task_count-- underflow guards.
- ghost.c: g_ghost_ring_count saturates at UINT32_MAX.
- adaptive.c: g_ledger_total saturates at UINT32_MAX.
- vertical_adapter.c: g_router_reject_streak saturates at UINT32_MAX.
- hindsight.c: g_next_sequence and g_total_count saturate.
- telemetry.c: g_rolling_sequence, g_emitted_count, g_filtered_count saturate.
- virtual_time.c: query_count saturates; current_time addition uses overflow
  saturation instead of silent wrap.
- regression_localize.c: circuit breaker counters (consecutive_failures,
  consecutive_successes, total_trips, total_recoveries, events_since_trip)
  all saturate at UINT32_MAX.
- timer_wheel.c: active_count-- guarded with >0 check (2 sites).

NULL pointer and undefined behavior fixes:
- budget.c (bd-1bq): NULL guards on all 7 public API functions — NULL budget
  returns safe defaults (identity for meet, 0/exhausted for queries).
- cancel.c: asx_cancel_strengthen handles NULL a/b without dereferencing.
- outcome.c: memset result struct in asx_outcome_join to avoid uninitialized
  fields; added missing #include <string.h>.
- lifecycle.c (bd-1zb): guard size > ASX_REGION_CAPTURE_ARENA_BYTES before
  alignment to prevent asx_align_up_u32 overflow in capture alloc.
- regression_localize.c: abs_i32 widens to int64_t before negation to avoid
  UB when v == INT32_MIN; blame score uses uint64_t intermediate to prevent
  multiplication overflow.
- virtual_time.c: JITTER anomaly widens before negation for INT64_MIN safety;
  JUMP anomaly uses overflow-saturating addition; added default: break in
  anomaly switch.

Bug fixes:
- mpsc.c (bd-23l): recv after sender-closed now checks receiver-closed and
  fully-closed states before sender-closed; sender-closed with pending
  reserves returns WOULD_BLOCK instead of premature DISCONNECTED.
- cancellation.c (bd-3js): cancel_propagate now uses asx_task_cancel_with_origin
  atomically instead of asx_task_cancel + manual origin overwrite, preserving
  stronger cancel's origin attribution.
- hooks.c: deterministic validation uses compile-time ASX_DETERMINISTIC flag
  rather than reading from the hooks struct itself (which could mismatch).
- adapter.c (bd-kaf): added default case to dispatch switch; fixed infinite
  loop in isomorphism sweep when capacity == UINT32_MAX.
- seqlock_ebr_spike.c: fixed seqlock read retry logic (was not incrementing
  retries on mismatch); fixed raw benchmark to separate read/write cycle
  measurement (raw_write_cycles was being reported as raw_read_cycles).
- trace.c: import_binary now decodes directly into g_replay_ref (saves one
  ASX_TRACE_CAPACITY-sized stack array); continuity_check no longer
  saves/restores trace ring (unnecessary since import no longer overwrites it);
  invalidates replay reference before import to prevent stale state.
- adaptive.c: ledger digest now includes evidence_count and evidence values
  for completeness.
- test_log.h: replaced strcpy with strncpy+null-terminate for buffer safety.

Test expansion (bd-37l):
- test_trace.c: 13 new tests — binary export/import (basic, null reject, too
  small, roundtrip), continuity check match, aux mismatch detection, ring
  fill-once capacity, digest sensitivity to aux/entity_id/order, all event
  kinds coverage.
- test_mpsc.c: 4 new tests — recv with pending reserve returns WOULD_BLOCK,
  reserve abort transitions to DISCONNECTED, recv after receiver-closed,
  recv after fully-closed.
- test_cancellation.c: 1 new test — cancel_propagate preserves stronger
  cancel's origin_region (C4 fix regression test).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
